title: <div><font face="ZapfDingbatsITC">✔</font> Forces factions to consider risk vs.
content:
✔ Forces factions to consider risk vs. reward before proposing a ritual.
✔ Adds a layer of diplomacy—factions must secure enough support before making a move.
✔ Ensures the secret ballot vote has lasting impact beyond just one player.

📌 FINAL LOCK-IN QUESTIONS BEFORE EXECUTING VERSION 9.3

1. Should Players Have One Final Attempt to Purge Themselves at the End of the Semester, or Are They Locked in for Good?

✔ Ex: Should there be a “Last Chance” event where everyone gets one final transformation attempt before the semester ends?

2. Should a Faction Be Able to Recover from a Failed Ritual, or Are the Penalties Permanent?

✔ Ex: If a faction’s ritual is denied, should they have a way to restore themselves later, or must they bear the punishment until the end?

🚀 Now ready to execute Version 9.3. Awaiting final input before moving forward. 🎮📖 Are you fully satisfied with this plan?
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 549 (chunk 549/555)
